title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (IR) CEO Vicente Reynal on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Matthew Fort - Vice President, Investor Relations Vicente Reynal - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Vik Kini - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Halloran - Robert W. Baird & Co. Julian Mitchell - Barclays Bank Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Rob Wertheimer - Melius Research Stephen Volkmann - Jefferies Nathan Jones - Stifel Joe O'Dea - Wells Fargo Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to the Ingersoll Rand Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates
text: Ingersoll Rand's (IR) Q2 earnings reflect gains from solid segmental results.

title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Ingersoll (IR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.88% and 3.66%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Ingersoll Rand Announces Appointment of Mark Stevenson and Michael Stubblefield to Board of Directors
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, today announced that Mark Stevenson and Michael Stubblefield joined its Board of Directors on July 28, 2022. Mr. Stevenson is the former Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., a Fortune 100 company and world leader in serving science through its life science solutions, analytical instruments, specialty diagn

title: Ingersoll Rand Announces Three Acquisitions
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, has entered into agreements to acquire Holtec Gas Systems LLC (“Holtec”), Shanghai Hanye Air Purifying Technology Co., Ltd (“Hanye”), and Hydro Prokav Pumps (India) Private Limited (“Hydro Prokav”) for a combined cash purchase price of approximately $35 million. Holtec and Hanye expand Ingersoll Rand's air treatment capabilities and enhance the breadth of
